rows.source_ref: Radu Ciofu (handle Radu_C), 'PB dual stochastic system', ForexFactory thread 297661, ~2011, https://www.forexfactory.com/thread/297661 (author site ProfitBursier.ro/en)
rows.concept: A fast-vs-slow stochastic crossover sets the trend regime, then trades pull-backs (two consecutive opposite candles) in the direction of the fast stochastic.
rows.eligibility_reason: Pure-MQL5: two Stochastic oscillators (green %K72/slow1, red %K285/slow246, levels 76/24) plus 2-candle pattern on EUR/USD M15; deterministic entry+exit, no ML; framework must inject a protective stop (native 'open system' has no SL/TP).
rows.notes: Single-post thread, author frames it as an educational example ('not highly profitable', ~6.91%/yr, -14.61% system DD, -785 max trade DD, 2000-2011 spot no leverage). Long: green>red AND green>24 AND two bearish candles -> enter open of 3rd candle; Close Long: green<red AND two bullish candles. Short: green<red AND green<76 AND two bullish candles; Close Short: green>red AND two bearish candles. Highly specific optimized params (285/246) smell of overfit; indicator-only exits, no native SL/TP -> add framework protective stop + Friday-close. Just another EUR/USD FX indicator variant, low uncorrelated-driver value.
